claim_support.reason: Claims are linked to authoritative structured chunk IDs and calc IDs. The evidence objects contain the specific figures cited in the text, even though the calculations within those objects are flawed.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical errors in key growth metrics. Revenue YoY growth is stated as 36.27% (actually ~12.7% YoY; 36.27% is QoQ). Net Income YoY growth is stated as 316.88% (actually ~15.7% YoY; 316.88% is QoQ). These errors materially misrepresent financial performance.

citation_precision.reason: Structured cited chunk IDs and calc IDs correctly map to the evidence content provided in the pack. Inline citation labels are ignored per instructions.

temporal_validity.reason: All news dates and financial periods are on or before the as-of date (2025-08-11). No post-as-of claims detected.

consistency.reason: Internal mathematical inconsistencies exist where stated growth percentages (e.g., 36.27%, 316.88%) do not match the absolute financial figures provided in the same context (e.g., $2.748B to $3.096B, $555M to $642M).

financial_numeric.reason: Skipped because the report failed the Accuracy Gate due to severe numerical errors, inconsistencies.
